headline: Unilever Investors Find Food Deal Tough to Digest
summary: Unilever shareholders are having a tough time digesting the company’s plans to combine its food business with spice maker McCormick. Shares in the Hellmann's mayonnaise owner slipped further Thursday after suffering its biggest ever one-day decline on Tuesday—a more than 7% drop—the day the deal was announced.

headline: McCormick Eyes Global Expansion Through Unilever Foods Deal
summary: MKC's strategic combination with Unilever Foods aims to expand global reach, enhance capabilities and drive long-term growth and margin improvement.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on McCormick & Co, Lowers Price Target to $57
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains McCormick & Co (NYSE:MKC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $58 to $57.

headline: A Look At McCormick’s Valuation After A Prolonged Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot McCormick (MKC) has drawn investor attention after a challenging stretch, with the stock showing negative returns over the past day, week, month, and past 3 months, as well as over the past year. See our latest analysis for McCormick. The recent 30 day share price return of 30.79% decline, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 38.93% decline, points to fading momentum as investors reassess both growth prospects and risk around the current US$48.38...
